headline: FRENCH'S® ANNOUNCES PARTNERSHIP WITH ILLUMINATION'S MINIONS & MONSTERS, UNLEASHING FRENCH'S® GOOMI'S GREEN MUSTARD NATIONWIDE
summary: French's, the #1 Mustard brand in the World*, is bringing an unexpected twist to summer through a new partnership with Illumination's riotous new comedy Minions & Monsters, arriving in theaters July 1, 2026. The collaboration showcases how entertainment and food collide, bringing joyful and mischievous energy to life through a custom French's and Minions & Monsters animation, two limited-edition French's products with Minions & Monsters packaging, and immersive fan moments.
